heading: Issuance of regulations; maintenance of rec­ords
label: 3811 Issuance of regulations; maintenance of rec­ords
text: The Secretary is authorized to issue such regulations and to require the maintenance of such records as he deems necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to prior to repeal by .section 11 of Pub. L. 96–468section 3810 of this titlePub. L. 104–127
